headline: GMP OR GDP: AUDIT THE RIGHT WAY
subheading: Map your licences to the correct framework and scope the audit your business truly needs.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury split-composition pharmaceutical scene set against deep navy, conceptually contrasting manufacturing and distribution in one frame. On the left, a precise abstract representation of pharmaceutical manufacture: a luminous glass vial and sterile stainless-steel equipment glowing in teal and cyan light, fine condensation and clean reflective surfaces suggesting controlled quality production. On the right, an editorial vision of the cold-chain supply: stylised climate-controlled storage units and a sealed shipping carton beside a glowing temperature-monitoring data logger, bathed in cooler cyan. A subtle fresh-green accent line traces the journey connecting the two halves, like a quality thread linking make to move. Shallow depth of field, soft directional lighting, premium and trustworthy mood, abstract geometric balance between the two domains. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
